snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
snippet.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk рЯІЯвАНвЩАпЄП

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards рЯСї

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sisterвАЩs wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaosвАФuntil he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palaceвАЩs centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Faara Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael
DI: Sri Sarathi Studios
DI Colorist: Vishnuvardhan
VFX: WRC Studio LLP
VFX Supervisor: Sidharth Priyadarshan
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Director of Choreography: Pony Verma, Ganesh Acharya
Group Commercial Head (BTL): Hamavvand Chwda
Head of Marketing (BTL): Raveena S Deshpaande
Post Production Head (BTL): Manohar Pandya
VP Licensing and Syndication (BTL): Ankit Chauhan
Commercial Head (BTL): Mitesh Bilakhia
Executive Producer: Pooja Tiwari Angarish
Publicity Designer: House of Awe
Media Consultant: Spice
Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

#ZeeMusicCompany #PenMovies

snippet.title: Rama | Namit MalhotraвАЩs Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit MalhotraвАЩs Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 рЯПє
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit MalhotraвАЩs Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Adapted for Screenplay by Shridhar Raghavan & Nitesh Tiwari.
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa Directed by Priyadarshan in Bhooth Bangla Movie In Cinemas 16 Apr is set for Comedy with Horror Twist competing with Bhool Bhulaiyaa Kartik Aaryan Franchise & Manjulika Nostalgia competition. Bhooth Bangla Trailer hits hard on the spot with Fun Humour & dark Storytelling with lot of surprises, Trailer Reaction & full Movie Expectation would be shared in this Video. snippet.title: Patriot Malayalam Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

Written & Directed by: Mahesh Narayanan
Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar
Co-Produced by: C. R. Saleem, Subhash George Manuel
Music & Original Score: Sushin Shyam
Director of Photography: Manush Nandan ISC
Executive Producers: C. V. Sarathi, Rajesh Krishna
Edited by: Mahesh Narayanan, Rahul Radhakrishnan
Production Design: Shajie Naduvil, Jibin Jacob
Audiography: Vishnu Govind
Sync Sound: Vaisakh P. V.
Production Controller: Dixon Poduthas
Line Producers:
Sunil Singh, Niroop Pinto, Justin Boban, Jeswin Boban
Makeup: Ranjith Ambady
Lyrics: Anwar Ali, Vinayak Sasikumar
Action Directors:
Dhilip Subbarayan, Stunt Silva, Mafia Sasi, Riyaz - Habib, Mahesh Mathew
Costume Design: Dhanya Balakrishnan
Choreography: Shobi Paulraj
VFX:
Firefly, Eggwhite, Ident VFX Lab, Phantom FX, Binary Circus, Pictorial FX
Chief Associate Director: Linu Antony
Associate Director: Phantom Praveen
DI Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar ISC
Stills: Navin Murali
Publicity Design: Aesthetic Kunjamma
PRO: Vaisakh C. Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar
Digital PR : Vishnu Sugathan
Trailer Cuts: Arju Benn
Music Team: Nivin Raphael, Rithu Vysakh, Moses Toby
Trailer Music Mixed and Mastered - Abin Paul

snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song вАЬRunwayвАЭ performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and NigelвАФMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as вАЬLilyвАЭ and вАЬIrvвАЭ from the first film. 
 
вАЬThe Devil Wears Prada 2вАЭ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

id.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Trailer Terakhir
id.description:
Saksikan trailer baru untuk The Devil Wears Prada 2 dengan lagu orisinal вАЬRunwayвАЭ yang dibawakan oleh Lady Gaga dan Doechii. Dapatkan tiket sekarang dan saksikan film ini hanya di bioskop mulai 1 Mei: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Hampir 20 tahun setelah penampilan ikonik mereka sebagai Miranda, Andy, Emily, dan NigelвАФMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali ke jalanan kota New York yang modis dan kantor-kantor mewah Majalah Runway dalam sekuel yang sangat dinantikan dari fenomena tahun 2006 yang mendefinisikan satu generasi.

Film ini menyatukan kembali para pemeran utama asli dengan sutradara David Frankel dan penulis Aline Brosh McKenna, dan memperkenalkan deretan karakter baru termasuk Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak, dan Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms dan Tibor Feldman juga kembali memerankan peran mereka sebagai вАЬLilyвАЭ dan вАЬIrvвАЭ dari film pertama.

вАЬThe Devil Wears Prada 2вАЭ diproduseri oleh Wendy Finerman, dan diproduseri eksekutif oleh Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt, dan Aline Brosh McKenna. Film ini tayang perdana secara eksklusif di bioskop pada 1 Mei.

Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song вАЬRunwayвАЭ performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and NigelвАФMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as вАЬLilyвАЭ and вАЬIrvвАЭ from the first film. 
 
вАЬThe Devil Wears Prada 2вАЭ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

Lyrics:
Take your shoes off
Thank you for dinner baby
I had a really great time
I really loved the conversation
And that your car self drives
The pineapple air freshener
Is my favorite kind
Well this is me but
if you have time
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
Baby what's mine is now yours
The couch is really comfy comfy
Got some Chips Ahoy
If you're hungry hungry
You don't need to love me, love me, love me
I'm just so proud of my design
(to dim the lights)
Do you want the house tour?
I could take you to the first, second, third floor
And I promise none of this is a metaphor
I just want you to come inside
But never enter through the back door
House tour
Yeah, I spent a little fortune on the waxed floors
We can be a little reckless cause it's insured
I'm pleasured to be your hot tour guide
Baby what's mine is now yours
(Oh baby if you come inside, if you come inside
I might let you uh)
My house is on pretty girl avenue
My house was especially built for you
Some say it's a place where your dreams come true
My house
Could be your house too!
So um
Are you coming in or what?

#SabrinaCarpenter #HouseTour #MansBestFriend

snippet.title: NOSTALGIA BAIT? рЯЩИ | Bhooth Bangla Trailer Review | Akshay Kumar
snippet.description:
I had so many expectations from this reunion but the trailer leaves more to be desired. The movie called #bhoothbangla features #akshaykumar in the lead role and him reuniting with director #priyadarshan . The #bollywood movie gives us flashbacks to the franchise of #bhoolbhulaiya but will it be as successful? The movie stars #rajpalyadav #pareshrawal #wamiqagabbi and #tabu in prominent roles. I am genuinely curious, is this even funny? I hope you like the video on:-

snippet.title: GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA Official Bodo Music Video 2026 | Nikita Boro | Asha Boro | Sudemsona | Lee Shaan
snippet.description:
NIKITA BORO OFFICIAL Presents

"GUBUN RAIJWNI NONGA "
A Latest Bodo Music Video 2026

Produced by-- SANJ



вАЬGubun Raijwni NongaвАЭ sung by Aasha Boro and Nikitaa Boro is a beautiful musical piece that blends emotion with melody. The composition by "Swmkhwr Daimari" adds a rich and captivating musical layer that perfectly complements the mood of the track, The song carries a deep cultural essence, reflecting love, longing, and heartfelt expression through its lyrics and soulful voices.
                 What truly elevates the song is the stunning choreography by " Lee Shaan Ramy" who brings the music to life through graceful and powerful dance movements. Every step reflects the essence of the song, making it not just something to listen to, but something to feel and experience.
            Overall, вАЬGubun Raijwni NongaвАЭ stands as a perfect blend of melody, emotion, and visual storytellingвАФleaving a lasting impression on its audience

Both singers bring a unique charm to the trackвАФAsha BoroвАЩs soothing tone and Nikita BoroвАЩs expressive delivery perfectly complement each other.
The music creates a calm yet powerful atmosphere, allowing listeners to connect with the feelings behind the song. вАЬGubun Raijwni NongaвАЭ stands out not only for its melodious composition but also for the way it represents regional music with pride and authenticity



AUDIO CREDITS
Singer- AASHA BORO & NIKITAA BORO
Lyrics and Tune- SWMKHWR DAIMARI
Music/Mix Mastered by- AMAR BORO
Flute- ANUPAL RABHA
Serja- KULEN BASUMATARY
Recorded by- Pinku Das at Red AV Studio

Asst. - ANJU BORO

Asst. - GOPI BORO
Mua- MIJING ISLARY
Costume- DOKHONA ( SIKHIRI BRAND )

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Bairan - Banjaare

вЬЦ Stream / Download:
https://open.spotify.com/album/3ZIsrV7xUXWX4tR0vk1CGF

вЬЦ Follow Banjaare:
https://instagram.com/official_banjaare

рЯО§  Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–µ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–µin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: Race Gurram Re-Release Trailer 2.0 | Allu Arjun, Shruti Haasan | Surender Reddy | Thaman S
snippet.description:
The Icon of Mass is racing back! рЯПОпЄПрЯТ•

Feel the adrenaline rush once again as Race Gurram storms into theaters with a power-packed Trailer 2.0! вЪ°
Get ready to witness Allu Arjun at his stylish bestвАФfaster, fiercer, and more entertaining than ever before.

Directed by the trendsetter Surender Reddy, this blockbuster blends action, comedy, and swag like never before.

From the iconic madness of Kill Bill Pandey brought to life by Brahmanandam рЯШВ
to the sizzling chemistry with Shruti Haasan рЯТГ
every moment is a celebration of pure entertainment!
рЯФ• Bigger action
рЯФ• Sharper style
рЯФ• Double the madness

This isnвАЩt just a re-releaseвА¶ itвАЩs a full-throttle comeback!

Get ready to relive the rideвАФRace Gurram is back to rule the big screen! рЯОђрЯТ•

Subscribe to our YouTube Channel : http://bit.ly/1hE4KpS
---------------------------
рЯОђ MOVIE CREDITS рЯОђ

Movie: Race Gurram
Starring: Allu Arjun, Shruti Haasan, Shaam, Brahmanandam, Ravi Kishan, Prakash Raj
Director: Surender Reddy
Music Director: S.S. Thaman
Cinematography: Manoj Paramahamsa
Producers: Nallamalupu Srinivas (Bujji), Dr. Venkateswara Rao
Banner: Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Productions
Music Label: Lahari Music

snippet.description:
Harsh Mudgil Presents New Haryanvi Song 2026" " written , composed by Harsh Mudgil and Music Also by Harsh Mudgil. 


Follow Me On Insta-https://instagram.com/harsh__mudgil

#themudgil #ritaulirohtak

Singer - Harsh Mudgil

Composer -  Harsh Mudgil

Music - Harsh Mudgil 

Mixing  - Sagar Kaushik

Label -@Harsh Mudgil  
----------------------------------------------


Lyrics-

Thari Bolero 

F- Jha Bhi Jao Sath MaiJao
Pakki Jodi Doyaa Ki

M- Sarkaar Avaidh Bataya Kare 
Taskari Chale Un Lohya Ki

F-
Na suii tikti 100 t niche 
 
M- Bairi Dekh Aankhya N Miche

Jo Apne Aap Mai Gundey Sai
Gandya Ki Dhala Cholla Rai

F- 
Chaale Thari Bolero Paadti
Naake Or Sab Tolla Nai
Male- 
Karke Vaake Khujaa Baabe 
Paade Sabke Wholla Nai



1

F-
 kaan Pai vertue Laake Nai
 Thum Naad Pai teko Asla Nai

M- Hum Maang Firoti Lala Pai
Chutki Mai Metdya Maslya Nai

F- 
Kai Kai Mukbar Shehar Mai Sai
Tere Kitna Dum Hai Seene Mai

M- 
Kade Khatu Ji Kade Salasar
Mhari Jaale Gaadi Mhine Mai



F- Teri Ankhya Mai Mane Rum Laage 
M-  Na Na Madam Ji Bum Laage 
Mhare Aave Dudhiya Aisa 
Jo pistol Rakhe Sai Dola mai




Rap 
M- Aaye Hayee   R gori Mhare Apne Asool
F- Oye Hoe tu Role rakkhe  kyate Befizool

M-

M-Aay Haay Rai Gori Hum Paar Jaava Maar 
Banda Tohya Bhi Na Paana

F- Oee Hoee Tera Naam Chaale Itnak
Bairi Tne Jaane Har City Ala Thana

Chehre Pai Smile Pavgi 
Khi Baat Rai Misail pavgi
Jai Aaja Koi Yaara Nai Bhsad 
Call Mudgil Ki Dial Pavgi


2- F-
Tne Dekh Dekh Kai Jale Padosi
 Jalan Ke Tender Lere S

M-
Gori Chaale Gaadi Mhari
Silencor Inke Dhume Dere Sai


F- Teri Baata Mai Mane Dum Laage 
Producer Nai Kyu Kam Laage
Mai inke Lable Khoduga 
Jai aagya apne Rolla Mai

snippet.title: Easily 3 Star the Showstopper Challenge (Clash of Clans)
snippet.description:
How to 3 Star the Showstopper Challenge in Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth provides a tutorial for the new event attack which showcases the Rocket Backpack Equipment from the upcoming Medal Event. This will be the first Epic Equipment for the Dragon Duke. Best of luck with your 3 stars though and thank you for supporting the channel with Code Judo!

Suggested Video:
Beating Every Goblin Map WITHOUT Troops: https://youtu.be/2jAkp-m6CNw

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
snippet.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. вЬ®вЭ§пЄП 

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah 
Aah aah aah aah aah aah 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 
Dil ko roka magar dil gaya dil gaya 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 

Oh, haanвА¶ 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 
Tujhse nazrein mili dil dhadakne laga 
Teri chaahat mein paagal tadapne laga 
Maine tujhko chuna aashiqui ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Hey hey hey hey hey 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 

Oh, haanвА¶ 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 
Teri baahon mein guzri hai jo yeh ghadi 
Hai yeh mere liye to yugon se badi 
Ishq maine kiya zindagi ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

I love you ajay, ajay ilove you, ajay ilove you ajay 
Main khushi ke maare pagal ho rahi hoo 
Mere paav havaa me pad rahe hai 
Main ud rahi hoon 
Muje girne mat dena ajay 
Mat girne dena 
Muje sambhaal lena ajay 
Ajay ilove you.
tags: humsafar ke liye jaal movie song

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah
Aah aah aah aah aah

I never thought I would fall in love
like this My chain will be lost.

Oh, yesвА¶

snippet.title: Sankat Mochan Naam Tiharo - Hanuman Ashtak | Hanuman Jayanti Special Bhajan | Mohit Pathak
snippet.description:
On this auspicious occasion of Hanuman Jayanti, Divine India proudly presents a heartfelt rendition of the Sankat Mochan Hanuman Ashtak, sung with devotion by Mohit Pathak  
This powerful prayer by the saint-poet Tulsidas is a timeless call for strength, protection, and guidance from Bajrangbali, the remover of all obstacles and the epitome of devotion.

рЯЧУпЄП Celebrate the divine birth of Lord Hanuman вАФ the fearless protector, the greatest devotee of Lord Rama, and the Sankat Mochan (reliever of troubles).

Singer: Mohit Pathak  
Music : Vickky Agarwal
Arranged by : Akash Rijia
Lyrics : Traditional 
Video : GraphieEdit
Label : Playbeatz Entertainment  

рЯОІ Tune in, chant along, and let this sacred ashtak fill your heart with devotion and peace.

рЯЩП Jai Hanuman Gyan Gun Sagar!
рЯФФ DonвАЩt forget to LIKE, COMMENT, SHARE & SUBSCRIBE to *Divine India* for more spiritual and devotional content.

#HanumanJayanti #MohitPathak #HanumanAshtak #SankatMochan #DivineIndia #DevotionalSong #Bhajan #Tulsidas #HanumanBhajan #JaiHanuman
